storyInfo: Zuo Le runs into danger, and Mo Yi lends a hand, but she also takes the chance to snatch the strange token from him. Ch'en passes through a sentry post, and rescues a woman under attack by geists. Scriptgeists pour into the city, sending it into turmoil.

attributes.content: <p=2>Two days before the day of the full moon, Hour of Yin</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Reporting in—from the Hour of Yu yesterday to the Hour of Yin today, we have moved more than eighty percent of the residents from the area around the main street to nomadic plate C.
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Some residents remain due to official duties, property concerns, or other reasons.
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Urge them to settle their affairs at once and leave material goods behind. Time is almost up.
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: Understood!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Also, strengthen security inspections at checkpoints. Report any suspicious individuals or situations to your captain immediately.
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: Yes, sir!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: So Baizao's already evacuating the population... I wonder if the Sui Regulator has any news from the Tomb of Sui.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: That's a lot of sentries... best not draw attention to myself.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Time for a detour.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: That's—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Zuo Le goes around the checkpoint, but as he turns a corner, he spots someone who should not be there.
Zuo Le.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Are you...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Apologies, but may I ask... who you are, sir?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: The Sui Regulator is aware of your deeds at Mangshan Town and in the Garden of Grotesqueries. I was dispatched to meet you here. You've done well.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: You must be exhausted. Go to rest.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Thank you for your concern.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But I have to deliver a token to the Sui Regulator, and share the details of the Placation with the Supervisor at once, so I dare not retire for now.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Just the proof of the Placation. Fret not, just hand it here and I'll take care of it.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: As for the report, you may submit it at a later time.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Zuo Le subconsciously rubs the token in his pocket with his knuckles.
This is a special case, so I must submit the token and my report to the Supervisor myself.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Still doubting me, when I have the approval penned personally by the Supervisor for my actions right here?
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Zuo Le, I know you are very conscientious, but the situation is complicated. You need not be stubborn.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: I'm sorry, sir... but this is all too sudden, and I don't know where this change is coming from.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I do not doubt the Supervisor's orders, but could we at least head over to the Sui Regulator together so I can get a complete grasp of the situation?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Sir... what is the meaning of this?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Is someone obstructing official duties here?
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Stay your hand... for now.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: I've never seen the Sui Regulator cooperate with the Patrol Battalion before.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: As I said, things are complicated. This is how affairs are handled in wartime.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Zuo Le, tarry any longer and we may hinder our battle plans.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: I'm acting on orders. If you have any further questions, save them for the Supervisor herself later.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: 'Acting on orders'... dare I ask whose orders these are?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: That is classified military information that may not be leaked, Lord Zuo. I'm sure you understand, seeing as you grew up in the barracks.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Three hundred Candleholders in the Sui Regulator, and none know each other's past.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: So, how do you know my background?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Just who are you?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Seize him.
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Go!
What—?
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: A black sphere suddenly rolls down to the center of their stalemate, spewing out thick black smoke that spreads quickly through the air.
An ambush! Assume defensive positions!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Just run already!
Wha—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Ah!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Zuo Le jumps up onto the eaves, mid-exclamation.
After him!
attributes.name: Masked Candleholder

attributes.content: Footsteps rumble behind the young man as several soldiers rush in his direction.
Form a line! There's still time, no need to rush!
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Think carefully. Did you leave it at your desk?
attributes.name: Diligent Student

attributes.content: Y-Yeah! Probably!
attributes.name: Panicked Student

attributes.content: What's the matter?
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Sir!
attributes.name: Panicked Student

attributes.content: We finished an experiment outside the city, and only just the evacuation order...
attributes.name: Panicked Student

attributes.content: But we left something important in the school laboratory. We'll be back once we've fetched it, I promise! Can we go?
attributes.name: Diligent Student

attributes.content: Time isn't on our side, what could be so important...?
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: It's really important data! We spent years just to collect it!
attributes.name: Diligent Student

attributes.content: If we can iron out the issue, then maybe... just maybe...
attributes.name: Diligent Student

attributes.content: Show me your student card, and then go over there for a security inspection.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Thank you, sir!
attributes.name: Diligent Student & Panicked Student

attributes.content: Right, once you get the data, evacuate with the Academy's staff. Make sure you leave within twenty-four hours.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Of course!
attributes.name: Diligent Student & Panicked Student

attributes.content: Hold it there, girl!
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Me?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Young lady, Baizao is undergoing a mass evacuation. There is no entrance to the city without special permission.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: May I ask what brings you here?
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Ch'en tries to blend in with those entering the city, but the keen-eyed guard spots her immediately, and approaches.
She makes sure Chi Xiao stays unseen behind her.
I'm... looking for my uncle.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: He's old, has trouble walking, and brought a lot of luggage on this trip—so my aunt asked me to escort him out.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hm? But when the Ministry of Revenue issued the evacuation order two days ago, they brought out every elderly resident.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: My uncle isn't a local... He's a tourist from Lungmen, who came here for Mid-Autumn.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: He's... kind of a loner, and rarely talks to people. He's spent the last two days waiting for me to come pick him up at the inn.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Your papers, please...
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: ...Sure.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Lungmenite... Ch'en Hui-chieh... former Senior Superintendent of the L.G.D.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: And you're... an Infected?
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: I retired from the force because of it, but that was so long ago...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Thank you for your service. You may go.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: If you don't manage to find your uncle, seek the nearest guard for help.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: But make sure you leave the city within twenty-four hours.
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Thanks for the heads up.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Right, could I just ask... Have you seen a tall Lung with red hair and horns pass through here since yesterday?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: But the description is somewhat familiar...
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Don't worry about it. Just a passing thought.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Duoxie. I'll be going now.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Wait, miss! Where are you headed—
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: A muster signal?!
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: What's happening over there?
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Retreat! Everyone, run! Take cover!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: Attention all units—ensure civilians inside the sentry posts are safe!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: O-Over there... what's that black mass?
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: In the dark of night, as thick clouds shroud the moonlight's glow, an 'army' descends upon the streets.
No commands, no war drums, no rattling of weapons against armor—even their approach makes no sound.
A disciplined, formidable, but still indistinct battalion closes in on the checkpoint with a deathly silence.
Hey... did you hear about the ghosts in Baizao... before the city moved onto a nomadic plate...?
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: A ghost army...
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: You believe in folk tales too? Probably a mirage caused by the strange weather lately!
attributes.name: Vigilant Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: It's way too realistic to be a mirage...
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: No, look at their armor! It's totally different from ours!
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: That's no mirage—
attributes.name: Nervous Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: The army closes in, and the guard finally gets a clear look at the moving mass. Silent soldiers bear blurry, yet terrifying faces with old, bloodstained armor, like evil spirits from thousands of years ago.
A soldier's spear point nears the guard's neck before he can even react.
Fall back!
A shadow?
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: The Imperial Guard apprentice slashes forward, but merely changes the spear's trajectory, while the immense strength hidden in the soldier's attack startles her.
The spear point sweeps above her head, but the weapon unnaturally whips backwards, heading for her vitals.
There's nothing inside—
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: The soldier is destroyed by her slash.
Strangely, the other soldiers do not treat her as a foe, and simply advance along the empty road silently with no discernible destination.
Captain!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: Send word to the other barracks: these soldiers are anomalous enemies; exercise extreme caution against them.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: They don't seem to be actively hostile, so don't initiate conflict.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: Evacuate anyone along the way and be on guard for developments.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: Captain, where did they come from? What even are they...?
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: ...Geists.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: Dispatch some men to update the Sui Regulator at once.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: They're merely marching forward for now, but we cannot allow them to endanger civilians or trespass into restricted areas.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: At once!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Sentry Officer

attributes.content: I fear this unrest indicates whatever's happening inside the Tomb of Sui must be quelled immediately.
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: Could His Majesty's decree actually be...
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: Are they... already fighting?
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: A crimson sword flash?
attributes.name: Junior Drillmaster

attributes.content: My goodness... where did this army come from?!
attributes.name: Panicked Crowd

attributes.content: Th-They're headed our way! Help!
attributes.name: Panicked Crowd

attributes.content: 'Scriptgeists'....
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Still the same old look. Whose ancient dwelling dream is this?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Is it because It woke up? Or because you've returned home?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Look out!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Are you alright, madam—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: How can I ever repay you?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: What? No, there's no need for that...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I don't know where these creatures crawled out of, but they're dangerous. Just be careful.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en notices the woman calmly ignoring the surrounding commotion. She even turns to look at Ch'en herself.
Um...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Noticing the woman's scrutinizing gaze, Ch'en immediately sheathes Chi Xiao—in vain.
A descendant of the House of Yan.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: You must have misunderstood, I—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What say you—what's the difference between forcing one person's will upon the masses, and enlightening the masses with the insight of one mind?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Where's this question coming from?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You do not have an answer now?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: This isn't the best time to discuss it.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What a shame.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Perhaps we can continue our conversation another time.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: ...Perhaps.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: The woman does not wait for Ch'en to respond before melting back into the crowd.
Strange lady.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Actually, are these monsters that popped up out of nowhere... related to the 'bestial Sui'?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: They seem to be coming from the same direction—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Patrol Battalion flashes across his view as Zuo Le hides behind a wall.
What's going on inside the city...? Whose orders are they following? And why are they so fixated on this token from the Garden?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: That approval letter was indeed written in the Supervisor's own hand... but why would she be working with them—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: More troops?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: No, that's... that's?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Countless paintings flash through his mind, until it stops on a scroll depicting the Great Hunt in the Sui Regulator's hidden collection.
I recall a similar scroll in Father's study.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Could they be... geists?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: As he stays deep in thought, the leading geist suddenly rushes towards him.
Look out!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: The black geist disperses, leaving splotches of black ink on the nearby walls.
(This inkstain... a scriptgeist?!)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: (But how? Don't tell me, that vanished proxy...)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: My Lord! Are you—
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Pester me any longer and I shan't show you mercy!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Th-There's a misunderstanding, sir!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: I saw you getting attacked by that monster, so I ran here to help...
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: You're not apprehending me?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: My Lord must be joking... I only just received orders to assist the Candleholders in cleansing the monsters...
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Have you seen any other Candleholders?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: N-No.
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: (The city is in turmoil, but the Sui Regulator hasn't sent anyone...)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: (And the Patrol Battalion... obviously two different directives have been issued...)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: (I must get to the bottom of this, once I meet with the Supervisor.)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: My apologies... this was my mistake. Please excuse me.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: It's dangerous here. Keep safe.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: His sword flashes in a spin as Zuo Le dispatches several nearby geists, and he instantly vanishes into an alley.
S-So fast!
attributes.name: Patrol Battalion Guard

attributes.content: Gah... why the rush?
More and more scriptgeists this way...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Where exactly did they come from...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: —Come out!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Alright, alright... Here I am, don't get mad now.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: It's you—!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You, girl, you're coming with me.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: You don't get along with that Candleholder boy, and you'll just keep fighting in there. Whatever you're looking for, he can find it for you.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: And what is your intention, having followed me the whole way?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Why the attitude? Shouldn't you be happy, reuniting with an acquaintance?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I believe the Old Tianshi has her reasons for letting you go.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But I can't trust you... a Shanhaizhong.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Fine, fine... O righteous and benevolent Lord Zuo of the Sui Regulator, I know you look down upon us lot.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: But you're being hunted down by your own people. Surely we can cooperate a little?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I believe there's been a misunderstanding... I'll go to see the Supervisor, and from there, I will naturally—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Hold on, how do you know the Sui Regulator is after me?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You numbskull! They would be walking you back right now, if I hadn't stepped in when they were surrounding you back there!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Wait, that was you—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Duh! Who else would dare get in the Sui Regulator's way?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I saved your life, so could you be just a bit nicer, maybe?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: There are geists in the vicinity, miss—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: So you should be careful.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Damn it... these blasted things are crawling everywhere. Situation's even worse than I thought.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Enough nonsense. Where's the thing you got from the Garden?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What...? You want it too?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I'm not telling you.
attributes.name: Zuo Le
Mo Yi
attributes.content: Hey—

attributes.name: Mo Yi
attributes.content: Huff...!
She turns around, pointing towards the growing mass of scriptgeists, accumulating from all directions.
Ignore me, and you'd better have a way to deal with all of that.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You know how to use that token?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I... do not.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Then just zip it and hand it over!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: After a momentary reluctance, Zuo Le finally takes out the 'doll' he took so much care to keep on himself.
This color... it really is her.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Where did you get it?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: In a study, or was it a memorial hall?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I can't recall... I don't know why, but our memories of the Garden are a mess.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I have a question, though. Is this object, as you say, able to stop Yan and the bestial Sui from going to war?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I'll tell you later. For now, we're going to use it to take care of these ugly things!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Mo Yi unceremoniously snatches the token from him.
Hey—!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: All to break the stalemate—the only way out.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: The girl leaps forward, putting distance between her and Zuo Le.
(—The forbidden Arts from that day!)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Wait, you can't do that inside the city—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: With ink flowing as years roll on, annals are wrought; through spring and autumn's turns, the tale of countless lives is told—
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: In the name of the Shanhaizhong, I beseech thee: Fifth of the Twelve, bearing the name Jie—manifest!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: She holds the token with a stern expression, and recites her chant—
But it seems... as if nothing is happening?
Huh... so that's not how you use it.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: My guess was off...?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Oh well, works for me.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Let me borrow this for a bit. I'll give it back once I'm done studying it.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Wait! You're not going anywhere!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: <p=2>Two days before the day of the full moon, Hour of Ch'en</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: The geists vanished with the sunrise.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: They were all coming from here. So this must be the source.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Sky Mirror Pavilion... this is the place?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Who is it?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Stop right there!
attributes.name: Aloof Woman
